                     WhseActivLine."Source Type", WhseActivLine."Source Subtype", WhseActivLine."Source No.", WhseActivLine."Source Line No.", WhseActivLine."Source Subline No.", false, WhseItemTrackingSetup, WhseActivLine);
 
-            TotalAvailQtyBase :=
-              QtyInWhseBase -
-              QtyPickedNotShipped -
-              Abs(Item."Reserved Qty. on Inventory") +
-              LineReservedQtyBase;
+            if WhseItemTrackingSetup."Lot No. Required" or WhseItemTrackingSetup."Serial No. Required" or WhseItemTrackingSetup."Package No. Required" then
+                // When tracking is required, calculate available qty considering only OTHER reservations on the same lot
+                TotalAvailQtyBase :=
+                  QtyInWhseBase -
+                  QtyPickedNotShipped -
+                  (Abs(Item."Reserved Qty. on Inventory") - LineReservedQtyBase)
+            else
+                // Original formula for non-tracked items
+                TotalAvailQtyBase :=
+                  QtyInWhseBase -
+                  QtyPickedNotShipped -
+                  Abs(Item."Reserved Qty. on Inventory") +
+                  LineReservedQtyBase;
         end;
